tasks.title: Define compare endpoint request/response Zod schemas in @repo/schemas
tasks.description: Add CompareAccommodationsRequestSchema ({ ids: string[] } with min 2 / max-bound length) and the compare response schema (reusing the existing accommodation summary shape for the matrix fields) in packages/schemas/src. Export types via @repo/schemas. Tests: packages/schemas/src/**/test/*.test.ts asserting valid/invalid ids arrays (empty, too few, too many, non-uuid) parse/reject as expected.

tasks.title: Update MAX_COMPARE_ITEMS per-plan limits in billing config
tasks.description: In packages/billing/src/config/plans.config.ts: tourist-plus MAX_COMPARE_ITEMS 4 -> 2 (line ~462); TOURIST_VIP_LIMITS.MAX_COMPARE_ITEMS -1 -> 4 (line ~85), which cascades to tourist-vip + the 6 owner/complex plans that inherit the VIP tier. tourist-free stays without CAN_COMPARE_ACCOMMODATIONS. Tests: update/add billing config tests asserting limit('max_compare_items') == 2 for tourist-plus, == 4 for tourist-vip and an inheriting owner/complex plan, and that tourist-free lacks the entitlement.

subtasks.title: Config tests for new per-plan values

tasks.title: Build POST /protected/accommodations/compare route + handler
tasks.description: Create the route in apps/api/src/routes/accommodation/protected/ mounting entitlementMiddleware() + gateComparator(). Handler: validate body with T-001 schema, set currentCompareItemsCount in context so gateComparator enforces MAX_COMPARE_ITEMS, fetch the N accommodations by ids (via existing service/model), return the matrix payload. Register the route in the protected accommodation index. Tests: covered by T-005 (integration).

subtasks.title: Handler: set count + fetch by ids

tasks.title: Remove PHANTOM-GATE note from gateComparator()
tasks.description: In apps/api/src/middlewares/tourist-entitlements.ts, remove the '// PHANTOM-GATE (SPEC-145): route not built yet' comment block (and the 'do NOT build without a spec' note) now that POST /compare ships. Update docs/billing/endpoint-gate-matrix.md to move the comparator out of the Phantom Gates section. No new tests; existing gate tests still apply.

tasks.title: Integration tests for the compare endpoint
tasks.description: In apps/api test suite for the route: assert no-entitlement (tourist-free) -> ENTITLEMENT_REQUIRED; over-limit (Plus with 3 ids, VIP with 5 ids) -> LIMIT_REACHED; happy path Plus(2)/VIP(4) returns the matrix payload. Use the role x plan test users / existing auth test helpers. AAA pattern.

tasks.title: Build compare-store (singleton pub/sub + localStorage)
tasks.description: Create apps/web/src/store/compare-store.ts following the toast-store.ts pattern: module-singleton state { ids: string[] }, subscribe/getSnapshot, addToCompare/removeFromCompare/clearCompare, useCompareStore() via useSyncExternalStore, persisted to localStorage (read on init). Tests: apps/web store test for add/remove/clear, dedupe, and localStorage round-trip.

tasks.title: Client-side limit enforcement via useMyEntitlements
tasks.description: Add a helper/hook (apps/web/src) that combines compare-store with useMyEntitlements: expose canCompare = has('can_compare_accommodations'), maxItems = limit('max_compare_items'), and a guarded add that blocks when count would exceed maxItems (treat -1 / future values defensively). Returns reason ('upsell' | 'limit') for the UI. Tests: unit tests for the guard logic across free/plus(2)/vip(4).

tasks.title: Build CompareButton island with upsell
tasks.description: Create apps/web/src/components/shared/compare/CompareButton.client.tsx following FavoriteButton.client.tsx. Toggles the accommodation in compare-store; uses T-007 guard. Shown to everyone (D-4): free/anonymous -> upsell message ('requires Plus or VIP'); over-limit -> limit message. i18n via @repo/i18n (T-012 keys). Tests: component test for toggle, upsell on free, limit message.

tasks.title: Integrate CompareButton into card render points
tasks.description: Insert CompareButton.client.tsx into AccommodationCard.astro acc-card__actions (client:visible, parallel to FavoriteButton) and into MapCardsSidebar.client.tsx so map view selection shares the same store. Pass isAuthenticated as needed. Tests: render smoke for both card surfaces showing the button.

tasks.title: Build floating comparison bar/drawer
tasks.description: Create a floating bar/drawer island (apps/web/src/components/shared/compare/) showing selected items (thumbnails + remove), a 'Comparar ahora' CTA linking to the compare page, and a clear-all action. Reads compare-store; hidden when empty. Tests: component test for render with N items, remove, clear, CTA href.

tasks.title: Build comparison page with side-by-side matrix
tasks.description: Create apps/web/src/pages/[lang]/alojamientos/comparar/index.astro (+ React island for the matrix). On load, read ids from compare-store, call POST /protected/accommodations/compare to hydrate, render the side-by-side attribute matrix (same attributes for all plans). Handle empty state and error/limit responses. Tests: island test for matrix render + empty state.

tasks.title: Add i18n keys for compare feature (es/en/pt)
tasks.description: Add @repo/i18n keys for the compare button, upsell/limit messages, floating bar, and matrix headers/labels across es/en/pt. Reuse the billing.comparison namespace where it fits. No standalone tests (covered by component tests that assert key usage).

tasks.title: Activate compare row in PlanComparisonTable
tasks.description: Flip the 'compare' row status from 'upcoming' to 'available' in apps/web/src/components/billing/PlanComparisonTable.astro (line ~95) and confirm the per-tier cells reflect Plus/VIP availability. Removes the 'Próximamente' badge for this row. Tests: snapshot/render assertion that the badge is gone and the row shows availability.

tasks.title: End-to-end compare flow test
tasks.description: Add an E2E/integration test covering: select accommodations from a listing, see the floating bar, open the compare page, see the matrix, and hit the per-plan limit (Plus=2, VIP=4) + upsell for free. Use the project's web e2e harness. AAA pattern.
